title: Coordinator crash before durable decision
description: Every participant votes YES and enters PREPARED, but the coordinator crashes before it records COMMIT or ABORT. This is the classic blocking case that makes plain 2PC operationally painful.

participants.name: inventory
participants.notes: local reservation is durable but not final

participants.name: billing
participants.notes: payment provider is waiting for final confirmation

participants.name: shipping
participants.notes: label request is staged but not finalized
